title: zygia macrophylla
intro: Zygia macrophylla, also known as the Guanacaste tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Caribbean and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Zygia macrophylla has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
